name: Graphwar II
short_description: Graphwar II is an artillery game in which you must hit your enemies using mathematical functions. The trajectory of your shot is determined by the function you wrote, and your goal is to avoid the obstacles and your teammates and hit your enemies. The game takes place in a Cartesian Plane.
detailed_description:
Graphwar II is the successor to the acclaimed Graphwar game. It is an artillery game in which you must hit your enemies using mathematical functions. The trajectory of your shot is determined by the function you wrote, and your goal is to avoid the obstacles and your teammates and hit your enemies. The game takes place in a Cartesian Plane.
Graphwar II brings a modern UI, new game modes, character customization, replays, and a campaign to be played in single player mode. Graphwar II brings both an easier introduction to new players and also newer challenges to veteran players.
